title: "Streaming vs. Batch" Is a Wrong Dichotomy, and I Think It's Confusing
summary: Often times, "Stream vs. Batch" is discussed as if it’s one or the other, but to me this does not make that much sense really.
content: Often times, "Stream vs. Batch" is discussed as if it’s one or the other, but to me this does not make that much sense really.
